papaya.light: Anh sang mat troi day du, toi thieu 6-8 gio/ngay.
papaya.soil: Dat thit nhe, thoat nuoc tot, giau huu co.
papaya.pests: Rep sap, benh kham virus, sau duc than.
papaya.care: Rat nhay cam voi ngap ung; can vun goc va bo sung kali dinh ky.

mango.light: Ua nang manh, can noi thong thoang.
mango.soil: Dat thit pha cat, thoat nuoc tot, pH 5.5-7.5.
mango.pests: Ruoi vang, benh than thu, rep sap.
mango.care: Cat tia tan de thong thoang, bon phan huu co dau va cuoi mua mua.

pigeonpeas.light: Can nang day du de ra hoa tot.
pigeonpeas.pests: Sau duc qua, rep, benh nam la.
pigeonpeas.care: Tuoi vua phai, lam co som va theo doi sau hai khi ra hoa.
